$comment: Copy this file to <project>/.claude/integrations.json and edit. The plugin's hooks (plane-watch.sh, plane-sync.sh) read it on session start and on every Edit/Write tool call. If the file is absent, the plugin behaves identically to v0.9.0 (local-only). Charter: docs/direction/2026-04-30-plane-integration-charter.md
$mode_note: tracker.primary controls whether external sync is active at all. Set it to null (or remove the file) for v0.9.0 bit-identical behavior. Per-domain mode overrides tracker.default_mode. v1 supports modes: 'local' (no push), 'plane' (push, Plane is master semantically), 'both' (push, local is master semantically). v1 push behavior is identical for plane/both — the semantic difference reserves the slot for v0.11+ pull.
$secret_note: API token is NEVER stored in this file. It lives at .claude/local/plane.secret.json (gitignored, secret-guard auto-blocks *.secret.json) or in the env vars CLAUDE_PLUGIN_PLANE_TOKEN / PLANE_API_TOKEN. Priority: env > env > file > none(skip).
